title: Body size check is post-hoc: full response buffered before 1MB limit enforced
description: In fetch_card(), resp.bytes().await downloads the entire response body into memory, then checks body.len() > 1_048_576. A malicious server can send a multi-GB response that exhausts memory before the check runs. Fix: use resp.content_length() as a pre-check (like federation.rs does), and/or stream the body with a byte-counting wrapper that aborts after 1MB. The reqwest .bytes() call will buffer the entire response regardless of size.
